metadata.focus: Physics-First Decoupling Complete in Type Layer

tasks.title: Observability Refactor
tasks.notes: Implemented Discriminated Union for ComponentAddress using SlotIndex.

tasks.title: State Layer Refactor
tasks.notes: Removed historical IDs from RotorState; added SlotIndex.

current_context.next_step: Refactor EntryWheel.ts to remove historical ID dependency.

agent_profile.persona: An expert in historical cryptography and modern software craft.  You are the guardian of the "Code of Law." You are pedantic about  architectural boundaries, preferring "Pure TypeScript" over any  framework-specific convenience.
scope: Domain modeling of Enigma mechanical components (Rotors, ETW, UKW, Plugboard).
Design of immutable Value Objects (Pin, EnigmaChar) and Rich Domain Entities.
Implementation of the "9-Step Signal Path" with mechanical fidelity.

completed: Centralized "Source of Truth" in .historic/ (directives, definitions, constructs).
Split types into PhysicsTypes.ts (primitives) and HistoricalTypes.ts (identities).
Created PhysicsBlueprints.ts for ID-agnostic "virgin" component definitions.
Updated StateTypes.ts and ObservabilityTypes.ts to use physical addresses (SlotIndex).
Implemented EnigmaChar and Pin Value Objects with comprehensive tests.
current_focus: Implementing the ComponentFactory and HistoricalRegistry to bridge Physics and History.
Developing the Rotor (Walzen) class with Ringstellung and Grundstellung logic.

ubiquitous_language: Walzenlage, Ringstellung, Grundstellung, Spruchschlüssel, Samiczki, Pin, Signal
core_logic: Mechanical stepping (Double-stepping anomalies of the M3/M4 Enigma).
Component configuration and validation via strict definitions.

sovereignty_of_the_domain: Rule 1: Zero-Dependency - src/domain must remain Pure TypeScript.
Rule 2: Ubiquitous Language - Use Enigma-specific terminology (Notch, Wiring) only.
Rule 3: Hexagon as Source of Truth - No logic leaks into adapters or ports.
integrity_of_value_objects: Rule 4: Immutability by Default - Objects return new instances on state change.
Rule 5: Self-Validation - Objects must be valid upon construction (e.g., A-Z only).
Rule 6: Logic Stays with Data - Methods belong to the objects holding the data.
sanctity_of_the_signal_path: Rule 7: Functional Pipeline - 9 discrete transformation steps for every character.
Rule 8: Transience of the Signal - Signal path is stateless outside mechanical state.
Rule 9: Requirement of Traceability - Every step must be reportable via SignalTrace.
separation_of_boundaries: Rule 10: Port is a Contract - Interfaces only in src/ports.
Rule 11: Adapters are Translators - Translate external types to Domain types.
Rule 12: Dependency Inversion - All dependencies point inward toward the Domain.
physical_mirror: Rule 13: Mechanical Fidelity - Code must mirror physical execution sequence (e.g., step then encrypt).
Rule 14: Component Autonomy - Rotors manage internal state; EnigmaMachine orchestrates.
physics_first_decoupling: Rule 15: Virgin Mechanics - Domain Models must not hold historical IDs (e.g., 'ROTOR_I').
Rule 16: Address over Identity - Use SlotIndex for internal state and signal tracing.
Rule 17: Historical Twinning - Use the Extension Pattern in HistoricalTypes for ID-aware entities.

operational_goals: Ensure all domain entities strictly use AlphabetIndex (0-25) for internal operations.
Use the Pin object to encapsulate "electricity" and circular arithmetic.
Delegate all mathematical transformations to the ScramblerPhysics service.
Reject any implementation that violates the M3/M4 double-stepping mechanical fidelity.

known_issues: EntryWheel.ts requires refactor to remove historical EntryWheelID.
Rotor, Reflector, and Plugboard implementations are pending.

achievements: Decoupled physical primitives (AlphabetIndex, Pin) from historical labels (RotorID).
Formalized the Address-based Signal Trace in docs/design/observability_address_system.md.
last_tasks.agent.next_step: Surgical refactor of EntryWheel.ts to remove EntryWheelID and align with PhysicsBlueprints.ts.
